chunks.text: One day after school, our teacher asked us to gather in the classroom.
In a quiet voice, she said
“ I want all of you to read more books.
“ My mother always tells me to finish my homework before I play,” my sister added.
“ My father asks me to help with the housework on weekends,” my brother laughed.
Tom gave me a small letter with a little shyness.
“ I want you to come to my birthday party,” the letter said.
I also want my grandmother to live happily for a long time.
Our teacher told us to think deeply about the questions in class.
“ I want you to discover how fun learning can be,” she said.
